name: Bud Cross Park
description:
Come play pickleball at Bud Cross Park in Brookings, OR! Total of 4 Pickleball courts. 2 with permanent lines and nets, and 2 with permanent lines with rolling nets available, or BYO net. 
Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free. Players are at the courts almost everyday between 9am and noon if its not raining. Schedule and signups are at playtimescheduler.com

name: Buffington Park
description: Buffington Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Port Orford, OR. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Cascadia Pickleball Zone
description: Come play pickleball at Cascadia Pickleball Zone in Brookings, OR! There are 5 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include lights, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and youth programming. The courts can be reserved.
fees: Fee required — $14 for 2hrs pay per play, or free with membership
hours: Monday to Sunday: 7am - 8pm Copyright © 2025 Cascadia Pickleball Zone - All Rights Reserved.

name: Riley Creek School Gym
description: Riley Creek School Gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Gold Beach, OR. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
fees: Fee required — $20/month or $5 for one time visitors
